question: A man travelled for 3 hours 20 minutes by car covering 150 km and then for 5 hours 40 minutes by bus covering 210 km. Find the average speed for the whole journey.
A man covered 200 km at 50 kmph, 360 km at 60 kmph and 240 km at 40 kmph. Find the average speed for the whole journey.
A man covered one-third of his journey at 20 kmph, one-fourth of the remaining at 10 kmph and the rest at 75 kmph. Find the average speed.
A and B start towards each other from X and Y at speeds of 84 kmph and 49 kmph. A travels 45 km more than B before meeting. Find the distance between X and Y.
A can reach a place in 8 hours. If he reduces his speed by 2/7, he travels 96 km less in that time. Find his original speed.
A and B start from P to Q which are 120 km apart. Speed of A is 24 kmph less than B. After reaching Q, B returns and meets A at 30 km from Q. Find speed of A.
